channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: Iran vows to ‘irreversibly’ destroy infrastructure after Trump’s ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: Iran vows to ‘irreversibly’ destroy infrastructure after Trump’s ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz  CNN
  2. Trump to Iran: Open Hormuz in 48 hours or U.S. bombs power plants  Axios
  3. Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Is Defiant After Trump Threatens Power Plants  The New York Times
  4. Trump and Iran step up threats over energy targets as war escalates  Reuters
  5. Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants as Iran strikes 2 Israeli cities  WBUR

item.title: No assessment Iran capable of striking London, Steve Reed says - BBC
item.description:
1. No assessment Iran capable of striking London, Steve Reed says  BBC
  2. Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities  CNN

  4. Iran Brings Europe Into Range With Missiles Fired at Diego Garcia  WSJ
  5. Britain sees no evidence that Iran is targeting Europe with missiles  Reuters

  4. Socialists battle to hold Paris as France holds mayoral elections  BBC

item.title: Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships - Reuters
item.description:
1. Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships  Reuters

item.title: A strike on a hospital in Sudan killed at least 64 people, WHO says - NPR
item.description:

  4. Strike on Sudan hospital kills at least 64 and wounds 89 more, WHO reports  The Guardian

item.title: Iran war's economic shocks could reverberate for a while - Axios

item.title: Trump's mixed messages on Iran: 'Winding down' the war and easing sanctions but adding more troops - AP News

item.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It? - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It?  The New York Times

  4. Iran war enters its fourth week with no clear end in sight  NPR
  5. Trump considers "winding down" Iran war without opening Hormuz Strait  Axios
